name: bluerock
description: BlueRock for Builders — the builder toolkit for Claude Code. Say 'research Acme Corp' and an agent team hands you a sourced dossier; set it up once and it runs your morning brief, your meetings, and your session wrap-up — all on your own files. Part of the BlueRock for Builders program at builders.bluerock.io.

plugins.name: bluerock
plugins.description: Your daily rhythm in Claude Code — onboarding that learns who you are and how you write, a morning brief that seeds your priorities, a living to-do, meeting prep + recap, and an end-of-day wrap-up that refreshes your dashboard. Plus an Account Research agent team — point it at a company and get a sourced dossier (overview, recent signals, strategic angles) in your voice. Say what you want, or use commands like /check (full name /bluerock:check).
